tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix parabolic path phase (1−cosθ factor)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the missing (1−cosθ) factor to phase_path so the aperture is equiphase at boresight (F1, critical).

**Files:** antenna-model/src/model/phase.rs:88-99 + tests; pattern.rs:932-944 beamwidth test; docs/antenna-model-design-doc.md §2.2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/phase.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs", "docs/antenna-model-design-doc.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model phase_path && cargo test -p antenna-model test_compute_beamwidth", "acceptanceCriteria": ["boresight equiphase", "(1-cos theta) factor present", "HPBW within 0.9-2.0 deg", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Replace inverted mesh-loss model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace pattern.rs::mesh_transparency with continuous inductive-grid reflectivity (|R|²=1/(1+4X²), X=(g/λ)ln(g/(πd))) in mesh.rs, wired into overall_efficiency (F4, critical).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/mesh.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model mesh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["continuous at cutoff", "eff->1 at long wavelength", "monotonic", "mesh_transparency removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Safe coordinate-system detection (6400 km + explicit override)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Raise ECEF auto-detect threshold to 6,400,000 m; optional explicit coordinate_system on Position3D; ambiguity warning for high-altitude geodetic (F3, critical).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/validator.rs", "openapi.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model coordinate", "acceptanceCriteria": ["threshold 6400km", "explicit override works", "ambiguity warning emitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Normalize azimuth to [0,360); fix coverage gating
tasks.description:
**Goal:** compute_emitter_direction returns azimuth in [0,360); is_in_coverage(&None,..) == true so corrections are not silently dropped (F5a + F6, critical).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model is_in_coverage && cargo test -p antenna-model emitter_direction", "acceptanceCriteria": ["azimuth normalized 0-360", "None coverage unrestricted", "tests updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Harden artifact loader (ANTC header, CRC, spline validation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Loader accepts legacy headerless and ANTC-headered artifacts with CRC32 verification; BSplineModel4D::validate rejects malformed knots so find_knot_span cannot panic (F2 service side + knot-panic medium).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/data/loader.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/types.rs", "antenna-model/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model loader && cargo test -p antenna-model bspline", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ANTC header + CRC verified", "bad CRC rejected", "knot validation at load"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full calibration mode emits service-format artifacts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** calibrate --mode full writes a service-loadable AntennaCalibration with 4D BSplineModel4D (az:=e_clock, el:=e_cone, freq, degenerate temp axis) and populated calibration_coverage (F2 tool side, critical). Round-trip evaluation test proves coefficient reordering.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs", "calibrate/src/main.rs", "calibrate/src/lib.rs", "calibrate/src/serializer.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p calibrate artifact_export", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service loads full-mode artifact", "3D->4D round-trip within 1e-9", "coverage populated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Small coordinate fixes (to_degrees, pole altitude, comment)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix EClockConeCoordinates::to_degrees unit bug, pole singularity in ecef_to_geodetic altitude (z/sin(lat) − N(1−e²) branch), stale MAX_ALTITUDE_M comment (F10, F12 + doc).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model to_degrees && cargo test -p antenna-model geodetic", "acceptanceCriteria": ["to_degrees returns degrees", "pole-safe altitude", "comment fixed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Apply correction surface in H3 link budget
tasks.description:
**Goal:** H3 cell gains include calibration correction (evaluator gating, applied AFTER cache lookup); correction_applied truthful; loss_db semantics documented (F8 + H3 labeling).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "openapi.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model h3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["correction applied per cell", "applied after cache", "correction_applied truthful"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Absolute gain from aperture integral; consistent reference
tasks.description:
**Goal:** gain = η·(4π/λ²)·|∬A e^{jΨ}dA|²/∬|A|²dA — removes hardcoded 0.55, builds in taper efficiency, removes per-call ideal-reference integration; reference_gain uses identical pipeline so loss_db has no ~2.6 dB offset (F7 + perf medium).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model compute_gain && cargo test -p antenna-model reference", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no hardcoded 0.55", "boresight 34-38.5 dBi", "loss ~0 at boresight", "no per-call ideal integration"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Beam squint along feed displacement direction
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply beam squint along the feed-displacement clock angle in direction-cosine (u,v) space instead of always shifting elevation (F9).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model beam_squint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["squint along clock angle", "elevation >= 0", "azimuth normalized"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Model axial feed defocus in phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** phase_feed_displacement takes delta_z (axial offset from focus); feed at (dx,dy,f+δz) instead of hard-assumed z=f (F11). δz=0 must be regression-identical. Calibration artifacts need regeneration after.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/phase.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model phase_feed_displacement", "acceptanceCriteria": ["axial offset produces defocus", "delta_z=0 regression-identical"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Report integration non-convergence honestly
tasks.description:
**Goal:** converged: bool on IntegrationResult; non-convergence → warning in compute_gain results; error_estimate = last inter-iteration difference (medium finding).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model convergence", "acceptanceCriteria": ["converged flag", "warning propagated", "honest error estimate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Report physical feed offset in meters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GeometryInfo.feed_offset_meters = (feed_x, feed_y, feed_z − focal_length) in meters, replacing the (Δaz°, Δel°, angle) packing (F15).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "openapi.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model feed_offset", "acceptanceCriteria": ["offset in meters", "zero for focused feed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Dedup surface models; add illumination space attenuation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete duplicate SurfaceErrorModel/Zernike/Gaussian from phase.rs (canonical in surface.rs); add (1+cosψ)/2 space attenuation to illumination_amplitude; fix edge-taper doc claim (F13, F14). Calibration artifacts need regeneration after.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/phase.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/illumination.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model illumination && cargo test -p antenna-model surface", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single Zernike impl", "space loss adds edge taper", "docs corrected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Robust beamwidth search
tasks.description:
**Goal:** compute_beamwidth brackets the FIRST crossing via 0.1·λ/D outward march before bisecting (no sidelobe lock-on); errors if no crossing within π/4 (medium finding).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model beamwidth", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brackets first crossing", "errors when no crossing", "guard test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Optional vehicle attitude for stable antenna frame
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Optional vehicle_attitude unit quaternion [w,x,y,z] (body→ECEF; +Z=boresight, +X=E-clock zero) on GainRequest/H3LinkBudgetRequest; when present, azimuth zero = body X projected ⊥ boresight, replacing the discontinuous Earth-Z heuristic (F5b, critical; API addition — design assumption flagged for review).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/validator.rs", "openapi.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model attitude", "acceptanceCriteria": ["None = unchanged behaviour", "attitude defines azimuth zero", "norm validated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: Fix find_knot_span off-by-one; remove export top-pad workaround
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Root-cause fix for the B-spline evaluator off-by-one discovered during Task 6 review. `antenna-model/src/model/correction_interpolator.rs::find_knot_span` uses `n = knots.len() - order - 1`; the correct number-of-basis-functions bound is `knots.len() - order` (matches calibrate's find_knot_interval). The bug loses the topmost knot interval for ANY BSplineModel4D producer (boresight mode, hand-built surfaces) — 232 dB mismatch at the top of range. Task 6 worked around it with an export-side top-pad; this task fixes the root cause and removes the now-redundant pad. NOT in original review (newly found).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/correction_interpolator.rs", "calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model correction && cargo test -p calibrate artifact_export", "acceptanceCriteria": ["top-interval query returns correct coefficient", "export top-pad removed", "round-trip still 1e-9", "both suites pass"]}
```
